reviews.review_msg: I really enjoyed the course layout and Doctor Lysova's research on family violence for Crim406. It was easy to prepare/guess which questions were going to be on the exams. The TA was also amazing, she was easy to connect with and really cared about my well-being. Crim300w was more challenging, not enough time for the EOT. My TA was not as good.

Amazing professor! I learned so much—not just the course material, but also how to think critically and apply theory to real-world situations. The teaching style made a huge difference, and I truly appreciate everything I gained from this course! Highly recommend!

Genuinely worst professor I have ever had at SFU, and I have been going here for four years. I strongly recommend anyone considering this class to not take it. The entire course is writing, two papers and two exams that are only long answer.

She constantly brings up her personal vendetta against feminist scholars for "taking grant money from her".

Prof is very well educated and kind. TA makes ur grade, and Marjan was very nice but soooo slow in marking. But, I am happy with my mark in the end because both were accessible and easy to communicate with.
